name: Modularized Dynamic-Granularity Video LLM for Multi-Event Long Video Understanding

description: arXiv:2607.15778v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Video Large Language Models (Video LLMs) have made significant advancements in various video understanding tasks. However, long-video scenarios remain challenging due to the tension between limited visual token budgets and the need to capture multiple key events. Existing approaches typically process long videos in two stages, i.e., i) select ke...
author: Wei Feng, Xin Wang, Yu-Wei Zhan, Yuwei Zhou, Wenwu Zhu
